queries.question: Show museums and planetariums with a ticket price of 20.
queries.sql:
SELECT Educational_Venues.Name 
FROM Educational_Venues JOIN Venue_Tickets ON Educational_Venues.VenueID = Venue_Tickets.VenueID JOIN Tickets ON Venue_Tickets.TicketID = Tickets.TicketID
WHERE Educational_Venues.Type = "Museum" AND Tickets.Price = 20.0
UNION
SELECT Educational_Venues.Name 
FROM Educational_Venues JOIN Venue_Tickets ON Educational_Venues.VenueID = Venue_Tickets.VenueID JOIN Tickets ON Venue_Tickets.TicketID = Tickets.TicketID
WHERE Educational_Venues.Type = "Planetarium" AND Tickets.Price = 20.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?educational_venues a :Educational_Venues .
    ?venue_tickets a :Venue_Tickets .
    ?venue_tickets p:hasEducational_Venues ?educational_venues .
    ?tickets a :Tickets .
    ?venue_tickets p:hasTickets ?tickets .
    ?educational_venues p:name ?name .
    ?educational_venues p:Type ?type_f .
    ?tickets p:Price ?price_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Museum")
    FILTER((STR(?price_f) = "20" || STR(?price_f) = "20.0"))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?educational_venues a :Educational_Venues .
    ?venue_tickets a :Venue_Tickets .
    ?venue_tickets p:hasEducational_Venues ?educational_venues .
    ?tickets a :Tickets .
    ?venue_tickets p:hasTickets ?tickets .
    ?educational_venues p:name ?name .
    ?educational_venues p:Type ?type_f .
    ?tickets p:Price ?price_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Planetarium")
    FILTER((STR(?price_f) = "20" || STR(?price_f) = "20.0"))
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

    ?venue_tickets p:hasTickets ?tickets .
    ?educational_venues p:name ?name .

    ?tickets p:Price ?price_f .
    FILTER(STR(?type_f) = "Planetarium")
